title: Exodus, Ondo launch tokenized markets with 200-plus stocks and ETFs on Solana
message_html: Exodus, Ondo launch tokenized markets with 200-plus stocks and ETFs on Solana ...
snippet: Exodus partnered with Ondo on to launch tokenized trading of 200+ stocks and ETFs directly on the Solana blockchain.

title: Ethena Labs to allocate $250 million to Securitize's Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as it deploys on Solana
message_html: Ethena Labs to allocate $250 million to Securitize's Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as it deploys on Solana ...
snippet: STAC is one of Securitize’s in-house offerings that provides onchain access to institutional-grade, floating-rate structured credit.
